formula.description: For each (classGroupId, dayOfWeek) key where dayOfWeek in [1..5]: build period set from slots with room != 0 and classGroup in taskClasses; sort ascending; if size < 2 skip; for each adjacent pair (prev, next): gap = next - prev - 1; if gap > 0: penalty += -2 * gap
sharedHelpers: computeClassGapPenalty(periods: Iterable<number>): number — pure function for full + delta
buildClassDayPeriods(classGroupId, day, ctx, state, excludeSlotId, overrideDay, overrideIdx): Set<number> — shared for full + delta; excludes moved slot and injects override

interaction.SC2: different key (per task-day vs per classGroup-day) — independent

deltaDesign.affectedKeysPerClassGroup: ≤ 2 keys: (cgId, oldDay) + (cgId, newDay), only if day in [1..5]
deltaDesign.beforePenaltyFormula: computeClassGapPenalty(buildClassDayPeriods(cgId, day, ctx, state, slot.id, oldDay, oldSlotIndex))
deltaDesign.afterPenaltyFormula: computeClassGapPenalty(buildClassDayPeriods(cgId, day, ctx, state, slot.id, newDay, newSlotIndex))
deltaDesign.deltaSoft: afterPenalty - beforePenalty summed over affected keys
deltaDesign.localComputation: O(affectedKeys × ctx.slots) — does not re-evaluate all classGroup-day pairs

f6AIsolationStrategy.teacherId: teacherId=null on all tasks → SC5 skips (no teacher)
f6AIsolationStrategy.taskGranularity: 1 slot per task (separate tasks per period) → SC2 skips (no same-day multi per task)
f6AIsolationStrategy.weekdayOnlyForDelta: Delta cases use weekday targets → SC7 doesn't fire
f6AIsolationStrategy.componentAssertion: Cases that must trigger SC3 (period 5) or SC7 (day 6) use component-level assertion: total soft + SC8 details count + SC8 sum, both verified

harnessHCases.title: {1,2,3} no gap
harnessHCases.isolation: 3 separate tasks, teacherId=null. SC2/SC3/SC5/SC7 all skip.

harnessHCases.title: {1,3} single gap
harnessHCases.isolation: 2 separate tasks, teacherId=null. SC2/SC5 skip. SC8 = -2 = total.

harnessHCases.title: {1,4} multi gap
harnessHCases.isolation: 2 separate tasks, teacherId=null. SC2/SC5 skip. SC8 = -4 = total.

harnessHCases.title: {1,3,5} multi segment
harnessHCases.isolation: 3 separate tasks, teacherId=null. SC3 fires (period 5) = -1. SC8 = -4. Component assertion.

harnessHCases.title: {1} single lesson
harnessHCases.isolation: 1 task, 1 slot. SC2/SC5 skip. SC8: size<2 skip.

harnessHCases.title: day 6
harnessHCases.isolation: 1 task on day 6. SC7 fires = -15. SC8: day>=6 skip. Component assertion verifies SC8 absent.

harnessHCases.title: 1 scheduled + 1 room=0
harnessHCases.isolation: 2 separate tasks. Period 3 has roomId=0. SC8: only period 1, size<2 skip.

harnessHCases.title: merged A(cg{1,2},p1) + B(cg{1},p3) + C(cg{2},p5)
harnessHCases.isolation: 3 separate tasks, teacherId=null. SC3 fires (period 5) = -1. SC8: cg1 -2, cg2 -6. Total SC8 = -8. Component assertion verifies 2 details.

harnessHCases.title: {1,3}→{1,2} reduce gap
harnessHCases.isolation: SC8-only delta via teacherId=null + 1 slot/task + weekday. MIN_PERT 3rd-position.

harnessHCases.title: {1,2}→{1,3} introduce gap
harnessHCases.isolation: SC8-only delta via teacherId=null + 1 slot/task + weekday. MIN_PERT 3rd-position.

harnessHCases.title: day 1 → day 2 (F6A redesign from move-to-weekend)
harnessHCases.isolation: Cross-day weekday to fully isolate from SC2/SC7. SC8-only delta.

harnessHCases.title: merged A p1→p2 with B at p3
harnessHCases.isolation: SC8-only delta: cg1 +2 + cg2 +2 = +4. teacherId=null + 1 slot/task + weekday. MIN_PERT 3rd-position.

f6ACorrectionsFromF6.H1: soft=-23 (mixed) → total=0, SC8=0 (SC8-only verified via isolation)
f6ACorrectionsFromF6.H4: soft=-28 (mixed) → total=-5, SC8=-4 (SC3 -1 also fires, component assertion)
f6ACorrectionsFromF6.H6: soft=-40 (mixed) → total=-15, SC8=0 (SC7 -15 also fires, component assertion)
f6ACorrectionsFromF6.H8: soft=-9 (kept) but added component assertion: SC8 count=2, sum=-8
f6ACorrectionsFromF6.H11: soft=-3 (mixed SC8+SC2+SC7) → redesigned to cross-day weekday, total=+2, SC8=+2 (SC8-only)

defaultSnapshot.reason: Default fixture (3 rooms, 3 tasks, 4 slots) has no (classGroup, day) key with size >= 2 and a gap. classGroup 1 has {1,2} (no gap), classGroup 2 has {1} (size<2), classGroup 3 has {5} (size<2). SC8 does not fire.

filesUnmodifiedF6A: src/lib/scheduler/score.ts (no SC8 implementation bug found by isolation tests)
